# Proposal (Template)

**Prepared for:** [Client / Business Name]
**Prepared by:** Aegis Health AI Ltd (trading as Aegis AI)
**Date:**
**Valid until:** [recommend 14–30 days — open-ended proposals let scope drift before signing]

## The situation
[1–2 paragraphs restating the client's problem in their own words, from the discovery call/questionnaire — this is the single most important section: a client should read this and think "they actually listened," not "this is a template with my name pasted in."]

## What we're proposing
[Which motion this is: Productized AI / Custom Development / Managed Services — see [`BusinessModel.md`](../BusinessModel.md). Plain-English description of the solution, not a feature list yet.]

## Scope — exactly what's included
- [Itemized deliverable 1]
- [Itemized deliverable 2]
- [Itemized deliverable 3]

## Explicitly out of scope
[This section prevents scope-creep disputes later — list anything the client might reasonably assume is included but isn't, e.g. "ongoing content updates after launch," "logo design," "paid ad management."]

| Milestone | Target date |
|---|---|
| Deposit received / kickoff | |
| [Milestone, if project >£2,500 — see [`PricingStrategy.md`](../PricingStrategy.md)] | |
| Client review | |
| Launch | |

## Investment
| Item | Price |
|---|---|
| [Line item] | £ |
| **Total** | **£** |

Payment structure: [50/50 deposit+final, or 30/40/30 deposit+milestone+final — per [`PricingStrategy.md`](../PricingStrategy.md), based on project size]

## What happens next
1. Reply to confirm, or ask any questions.
2. We send a Statement of Work + deposit Payment Link.
3. Once the deposit clears, we schedule kickoff.

---
*This proposal is not a contract. Scope, price and timeline become binding once reflected in a signed Statement of Work.*
